ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., JCOM) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., JCOM) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date */,
  "delisted_date" TEXT /* Delisting date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading volume */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry classification */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* Sub-industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_classifications_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
